title: Chef
description:
We are seeking an experienced and skilled Bangladeshi Chef to prepare authentic Bangladeshi cuisine while maintaining high standards of food quality, hygiene, and kitchen operations. The chef will be responsible for daily food preparation, menu execution, and ensuring customer satisfaction in a fast-paced restaurant environment in Singapore.

Key Roles & Responsibilities

1. Food Preparation & Cooking

  • Prepare and cook authentic Bangladeshi dishes according to company recipes and standards.

  • Ensure consistency in taste, portion size, and presentation.

  • Plan daily food preparation and cooking schedules.

  • Handle raw ingredients properly and ensure freshness and quality.

2. Menu Planning & Development

  • Assist in developing and improving menu items based on customer demand.

  • Suggest new Bangladeshi dishes and seasonal specials.

  • Control food costs by minimizing wastage and efficient use of ingredients.

3. Kitchen Operations

  • Maintain cleanliness and organization of the kitchen at all times.

  • Ensure compliance with Singapore NEA food hygiene and safety regulations.

  • Monitor kitchen equipment and report any maintenance issues.

  • Manage stock levels and assist with ordering of supplies.

4. Hygiene & Safety

  • Follow food safety standards and personal hygiene practices strictly.

  • Ensure all food preparation areas meet hygiene requirements.

  • Properly store food items according to safety guidelines.

5. Teamwork & Supervision

  • Work closely with kitchen assistants and service staff.

  • Train junior kitchen staff when required.

  • Follow instructions from the Head Chef or Restaurant Manager.

6. Customer Satisfaction

  • Maintain high food quality to meet customer expectations.

  • Handle special dietary requests when needed.

  • Ensure timely preparation of orders during peak hours.

    Job Requirements

    Education & Certification

    • Minimum 2–5 years of experience as a Bangladeshi Chef or similar role.

    • Certificate in Culinary Arts or relevant kitchen training preferred.

    • Valid Food Hygiene Certificate (or willing to obtain in Singapore).

    Skills & Knowledge

    • Strong knowledge of Bangladeshi cuisine (curries, biryani, roti, kebabs, seafood, vegetarian dishes, etc.).

    • Ability to work in a fast-paced kitchen environment.

    • Good time management and organizational skills.

    • Basic communication skills in English or Malay preferred.

    Physical & Work Conditions

    • Able to stand for long hours and work under pressure.

    • Willing to work weekends, public holidays, and shift work.

    • Physically fit for kitchen duties.

    Personal Attributes

    • Hardworking, disciplined, and responsible.

    • Good attitude and teamwork spirit.

    • Honest and reliable.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
